Moderate cluster contention warrants reserving light headroom to protect incoming high-priority jobs without significantly impacting existing workload.

Moderate cluster contention allows reserving light headroom to protect incoming high-priority jobs without significantly impacting existing workload.

High contention and many prod jobs incoming justify heavy reservation.
High contention and few incoming prod jobs justify no reservation.
